seo.title: Setu Clinic — Clinic & Appointment Management Software for India & Global Businesses | Coming Soon
seo.description: Setu Clinic is clinic management software for appointments, patient records and front-desk operations — built for clinics in India and globally. Get notified when it launches.

hero.headline: Clinic & Appointment Management Software for India & Global Businesses
hero.subheadline: Appointments, patient records and front-desk operations for clinics of any size, in India and worldwide — part of the same platform powering Setu Dine.

body.headline: What we're building
paragraphs: Setu Clinic brings the same operator-first approach behind Setu Dine to clinics — appointment scheduling that doesn't double-book, patient records your front desk can actually find, and a front-desk workflow built around how a real clinic day moves.
We're building it on the same multi-outlet architecture already running in Setu Dine, so multi-location clinics get visibility across every branch from day one.

cta.headline: Want early access to Setu Clinic?
cta.subtext: Tell us about your clinic and we'll notify you as soon as Setu Clinic launches.

crossSell.text: Running a restaurant instead? Setu Dine is live today.
